meaning: adj.可用(地)图表示的,可在(地)图上标示的
examples: With this wizard, you can see all of the mappable objects.
If mappable, the Windows construct can be mapped to the specified Linux construct (s) by closely examining the types, parameters, return codes, and such.
The classification column (which explains classification constructs used in this article) indicates whether the Windows construct is mappable or context specific.
